data.title_japanese: カレーメシ・イン・ミラクル
data.synopsis:
An unprecedented, over-the-top collaboration between Nissin Curry Meshi and hololive has become a reality!

This is the music video for the original song, Curry Meshi in Miracle, sung by Spice Love (Oozora Subaru, Minato Aqua, Usada Pekora)

(Source: Official Hololive YouTube channel)

data.title: Da Erduo Tutu
data.synopsis: Three-year-old Hu Tutu is a bright, mischievous, and intelligent child, he had amazingly big ears. He is nice and joyful by nature. He likes to be friendly to everyone around him, and is enthusiastic about the world around him, and possesses original ideas and inventiveness. People are often taken aback by his comments and actions.

data.title: Xiao Zhuoma
data.synopsis:
The story takes place in the beautiful Tibet. In order to protect the Tibetan antelope on the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau, little Zhuoma and her companions fight against the female evil spirited spider, the green gecko, the red bat and the bad guys.

(Source: AniDB)

titles.title: Xi Bai Po 2: Yingxiong Wang Er Xiao
Xi Bai Po: Wang Er Xiao

data.title: Xi Bai Po 2: Yingxiong Wang Er Xiao
title_synonyms: Xi Bai Po: Wang Er Xiao
data.synopsis:
During the Second Sino-Japanese War, the Japanese army attacks Nangunlong, a village in Hebei Province. The attackers get lost and ask 13-year-old cowboy Wang Er Xiao for directions. To avenge the death of his parents and protect other villagers, Wang Er Xiao pretends to surrender, then leads the Japanese to the ambush of Chinese army.

(Source: IMDB)
